text: We have decided to accept involved the humor duty of learning, teaching, beginning process. I would ask as to the first step, which we should accomplish, and common effect in the show. I am wrong. We shall begin with the first of the three teachings, learnings. We begin with the mental learn teachings necessary for contact with intelligent divinity. At a steady state when required by the self, the mind must be opened like a door. The key is silence. Within the door lies an higher archical construction you may liken unto the geography, and in some ways the geometry for the higher Aki is quite regular bearing inner relationship to begin to master the concept of mental ism. It is necessary to examine the self, the polarity of your dimension must be in turn post where you find patience within your mind. You must consciously find the corresponding in patients and wisely versus each thought that a being has in its term an antithesis. The disciplines of the mind involve first of all I identify both those things of which you approve and those things of which you disapprove within yourself and then balancing each and every positive and negative charge with its equal. Each acceptance smooths part of the many distortions that the faculty you call judgment and genders. Thus the ability to understand each balance is necessary when you view patients. We use this as a simple example. Most configurations of mind have many facets and understanding of either self polarities or what you would call other self polarities can and must be understood as subtle work. These are the first four steps of learning mental discipline. The fifth step involves observing the geographical and geometrical relationships and ratios of the mind, the other mind, the mass mind, and the infinite mind. The second area of learn teaching is the study, understanding of the body complexes, it is necessary to know your body. Well, this is a matter of using the mind to examine how the feelings, the biases, what you would call the emotions, affect the various portions of the body consequence. And to accept repeating in a chemical-physical manifestation of the work you have done in the mind, the thinking, the consciousness. Must be first completely understood and then the opposite of the bias, allowed to find full expression and understanding. Again, the process of acceptance of the body as a balanced, as well as polarized individual may then be accomplished. Almost every case wherein you are attempting the understanding of the body of self or other self, you will again find that the most subtle discernment is necessary in order to fully grasp the polarity complexes in all. So that we may devote time to the third area commensurate with its importance.
